message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for SCAN commands

Tests SCAN, HSCAN, SSCAN, ZSCAN against live Redis for:
- Empty store scan
- Wrong arity errors
- Noncanonical integer handling (+ prefix, leading zeros)
- Missing key behavior for HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN
- Wrong type errors for collection scans
- Invalid option handling

17 test cases verified against vendored Redis 7.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
